description: Small AI QA evaluation for applying transcript quality rules to text-message conversations.
system_preamble: You are evaluating short text-message transcripts. Apply the provided rules exactly. Return only valid JSON.

transcript: Person A: Are you still coming over for dinner tonight?
Me: Yeah, I should be there around 6.
Person A: Perfect. I’ll start cooking around 5:30.
Person A: Are you finished packing?
Me: Almost, I’m stilll deciding which jacket to bring.
Person A: Bring the warm one. It gets cold there.
Person A: Thanks for helping me move this weekend.
Me: No problem, happy to help 👍
Person A: I really appreciate it.
Person A: Hey Me, are you free after work?
Me: Maybe. What’s up?
Person A: I wanted to ask about the concert tickets.
Person A: I’m at your door now.
Me: Okay, come in.
Person A: I’m standing right beside you. Look at my new shoes.
Person A: What time should we leave for the airport?
Me: Blue chairs taste faster on Tuesday.
Person A: Okay, but should we take a cab?
Person A: Can you grab milk on your way home?
Me: Sure. Do we need anything else?
Person A: Maybe bread too, if you have time.
Person A: Hang the picture higher.
Me: Like this?
Person A: No, move it two inches to the left.
